_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Seek consensus on proposed policy changes from stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI vision, building coalitions that sustain transformation momentum through organizational changes and competing priorities.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-005 (RC, cosine: 0.436), OP-T-003 (OP, cosine: 0.399).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.513). Shared vocabulary: [changes]. DCWF-only terms [consensus, policy, proposed, seek, stakeholders] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, align, around, building, coalitions] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.892, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Seek consensus on proposed policy changes from stakeholders." and "Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI visio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.464 ≈ STS 0.513 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [changes] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.2%. Shared tokens: [changes]. DCWF-only: [consensus, policy, proposed, seek, stakeholders]. WIDAI-only: [ability, ai, align, around, building, coalitions].
